revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-300

Alternative terms: Ionospheric error, Skywave error

The total systematic and random error resulting from the reception of a navigational signal after ionospheric refraction. It may be due to (1) Variations in the transmission path (2) Non-uniform height of the ionosphere (3) Non-uniform propagation within the ionosphere        (4) Horizontal components of refraction (5) Back scatter (6) Forward scatter.

Reference: I.R.E. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
